query:
SELECT id, title, versionLabel, category, active, publishedAt FROM release_notes WHERE versionLabel = 'Care catch-up 2026-05-10' AND category = 'community_care' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS acknowledgement_count FROM release_note_acknowledgements WHERE releaseNoteId IN (SELECT id FROM release_notes WHERE versionLabel = 'Care catch-up 2026-05-10' AND category = 'community_care');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute SELECT id, title, versionLabel, category, active, publishedAt FROM release_notes WHERE versionLabel = 'Care catch-up 2026-05-10' AND category = 'community_care' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS acknowledgement_count FROM release_note_acknowledgements WHERE releaseNoteId IN (SELECT id FROM release_notes WHERE versionLabel = 'Care catch-up 2026-05-10' AND category = 'community_care');
